---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/boazbibi/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/boazbb/

---

I'm Boaz, an AI researcher based in Israel. I spent the last few years at Lightricks making generative models do useful things — diffusion models, VAEs, fine-tuning, the works. Before that I wrote C++ drivers at Intel, which taught me patience.

I have an M.Sc. in Computer Science from the Hebrew University, where I worked on 3D scene reconstruction and hierarchical reinforcement learning. I also have a B.Sc. in Computer Science and Physics from the same place, which means I can misapply physical intuition to machine learning with some confidence.

I like understanding things from the ground up — this blog is where I write about the things I wish someone had explained to me visually. 

You can reach me at boazbibi@gmail.com.
